title: Evals Config
description: agentskills.io eval test suite definition. Stored at <skill>/evals/evals.json

skill_name.description: Name of the skill being evaluated

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for this test case

expected_output.description: Human-readable description of what success looks like

files.description: Relative paths to input fixture files

assertions.description: Verifiable pass/fail statements about the output
